root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no , (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as name , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type_description , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock FROM sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail , sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type , sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ) --arg /*WHERE*/ -- and ( ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date between '1/10/2019' and '30/9/2020' ) --วันที่ -- AND ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no_between '000014' and '000042' ) ) --ทะเบียน ORDER BY sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ASC, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no ASC
